title: SkyHanni for Hypixel SkyBlock
description: SkyHanni is a Fabric Minecraft mod. It is filled with many unique features for Hypixel SkyBlock. The majority of these features are centered on the Garden, Slayer, Fishing, Bingo, Diana, Rift and Mining.
body:
SkyHanni is available as a Fabric mod. It offers many features for Hypixel SkyBlock.
The mod is well-known for its unique garden overlays. 

# Features
- Diana
  - Waypoint Estimate + Inquisitor sharing
- Garden
  - Crop Milestone Display
  - ETA until next crop milestone
  - Visitor items needed with price, hover and click to open the bazaar
  - Money Per hour calculation for all crops
    - Using current Blocks per Second
    - Using True Farming Fortune
- Damage Indicator
- Bingo
  - Guide for Goals
  - Steps Helper with partial progress display
  - Craft Helper for Minions
- [And much more](https://github.com/hannibal002/SkyHanni/blob/beta/docs/FEATURES.md)

## External Requests

SkyHanni makes some external requests to third-party APIs to enable the functionality of certain features:
 - **Elite Leaderboards**: When enabled, makes requests including your player uuid and SkyBlock profile uuid to [api.eliteskyblock.com](<https://api.eliteskyblock.com>)
 - **Jacob Contest & Harvest Feast Sharing**: When **opted-in**, sends plain JSON data containing the upcoming jacob contest crops or harvest feast crops to [api.eliteskyblock.com](<https://api.eliteskyblock.com>)

No sensitive or private data is ever sent to a third party as part of using SkyHanni
